title: How to How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, eager to sell ebooks, courses, and templates online, but PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad won't let you. You're stuck between a rock and a hard place, unable to reach your audience. Unchained Commerce is here to help. We've got the solution to get you paid, without the hassle of traditional payment processors.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The automated delivery pipeline for digital products works in a specific sequence that eliminates every manual step. A buyer visits your store, selects a product, and initiates payment. The Web3 Wallet Connect module displays a QR code with the wallet address and the exact amount in their chosen coin, converted from USD at the current exchange rate. The buyer sends the payment. NOWPayments detects the on-chain transaction and fires a webhook to the Core Shop Engine. The engine verifies the payment amount and confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain. It generates a PDF receipt with the order details and sends the download link to the buyer's email address. The entire process completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation.
What You Need Before You Start

Pricing digital products in crypto is simpler than most creators expect. You set your price in USD. The Web3 Wallet Connect module pulls live exchange rates from price feeds and displays the equivalent amount in whatever coin the buyer chooses — Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Solana, or 300 more options. The buyer always pays the USD equivalent at the time of transaction. NOWPayments handles the currency conversion accounting. You receive the crypto equivalent of your USD price in your wallet. For USDT-priced products, there is no conversion at all — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus network fees that typically amount to less than one percent of the transaction.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these steps: purchase our Core Shop Engine for $49.99, purchase our Admin Dashboard for $29.99, and set up your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration. This will enable you to receive payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and deliver your digital products instantly to your buyers. You can also customize your frontend to match your brand and style.
You don't need a PayPal account to sell digital products online.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live and make your first sale, follow these steps: create a new product, set a price, and configure your payment and delivery settings. Use our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration to receive payments and deliver your digital product. Our NOWPayments payment processor will handle the payment processing, and our Core Shop Engine will automate the delivery of your product. Once you've completed these steps, you can share your product link with your audience, and start selling.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your system is running smoothly, you can scale your operations by purchasing our Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to take your digital business to the next level. This bundle includes our Core Shop Engine, Admin Dashboard, Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, and priority updates and support. With our Full Stack Bundle, you can focus on growing your business, while we handle the technical aspects.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell templates and fonts without using Gumroad or Payhip? Yes, with Unchained Commerce, you can sell digital products, including templates and fonts, without the need for traditional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. Our payment processor, NOWPayments, supports 300+ coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT, making it seamless for buyers to pay in their preferred currency.
Our payment processor, NOWPayments, supports 300+ coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT.

With our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, you can connect with your buyers, receive payments, and deliver your digital products instantly.
